quality.rationale: 通过能量动量张量体积分推导角动量张量的平移变换，展示时空平移对称性破缺与守恒量的几何依赖，逻辑链条清晰但题干略有截断

origin.question:
[文件 1: 1_s11_11.2_b.md]

Problem 11.2. Show
(b) that it is not invariant under the coordinate translation $\mathbf{x}^{\alpha}ightarrow \mathbf{x}^{\alpha} + \mathbf{a}^{\alpha}$ . Show also that

## Solution

(b) $\qquad \mathbf {J}^{\alpha  eta} (\mathbf {x}^{\sigma} + \mathbf {a}^{\sigma}) = \int \left(\mathbf {a}^{\alpha} \mathbf {T}^{ eta \gamma} - \mathbf {a}^{ eta} \mathbf {T}^{\alpha \gamma}ight) \mathbf {d}^{3}  oldsymbol {\Sigma}_{\gamma} + \mathbf {J}^{\alpha  eta} (\mathbf {x}^{\sigma}).$
Thus $\mathbf{J}^{\alpha  eta}$ is not invariant under coordinate translations (different angular momentum about different points).
origin.answer: $\\mathbf{J}^{\\alpha \\beta}$ is not invariant under coordinate translations.
origin.solution: (b) $\qquad \mathbf {J}^{\alpha \beta} (\mathbf {x}^{\sigma} + \mathbf {a}^{\sigma}) = \int \left(\mathbf {a}^{\alpha} \mathbf {T}^{\beta \gamma} - \mathbf {a}^{\beta} \mathbf {T}^{\alpha \gamma}\right) \mathbf {d}^{3} \boldsymbol {\Sigma}_{\gamma} + \mathbf {J}^{\alpha \beta} (\mathbf {x}^{\sigma}).$\nThus $\mathbf{J}^{\alpha \beta}$ is not invariant under coordinate translations (different angular momentum about different points).
